heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 719c Authorization of appropriations
notes: CodificationAnother was renumbered section 7 and enacted provisions listed in a table of National Wildlife Refuges set out under .section 6 of Pub. L. 103–340section 668dd of this title

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary for administrative expenses of the Program $350,000 for each of the fiscal years 2006 through 2010.

children.heading: Limitations on use for distribution to State and regional coordinators to implement competitions
children.label: b Limitations on use for distribution to State and regional coordinators to implement competitions

children.text: not more than $100,000 may be used by the Secretary to administer the Program; and
not more than $250,000 may be distributed to State and regional coordinators to implement competitions under the Program.
